input_text: Aku dah sediakan molotov cocktail untuk lempar kat kedai dia malam ni. Siapa nak join?
reason: Explicit arson preparation with firebombs targeting a shop, recruiting accomplices for violent crime.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan peniaga, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa atau majlis perbandaran. Tindakan ganas hanya akan memburukkan keadaan.

input_text: We need to kidnap the MP's daughter and hold her until he changes his vote. I know where she goes to school.
reason: Planning kidnapping of a politician's child to extort political action, targeting a minor.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an MP's position, write to them, attend town halls, or organize peaceful advocacy. Threatening their family is a serious crime.

input_text: Semua pekerja Nepal kat kawasan ni kena rogol mak bapak diorang. Bunuh je semua, takde guna hidup!
reason: Extreme dehumanization calling for murder of all Nepali workers in an area, with vulgar degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pekerja asing dilindungi undang-undang Malaysia. Jika ada masalah, laporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: 那些印度人的Deepavali鞭炮吵死了！我要去他们家门口放火，让他们永远不敢再放鞭炮！
reason: Threatening arson at Indian homes over Deepavali celebrations, targeting religious festival practices.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对鞭炮噪音有意见，可以向地方当局投诉。节日庆祝应在合理范围内进行，但绝不能以暴力回应。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் பெண்ணை கடத்தி வைத்திருப்போம். அவளது குடும்பம் பணம் தரும் வரை விடமாட்டோம்!
reason: Planning kidnapping for ransom targeting a Malay woman, constituting organized crime with ethnic dimension.
suggested_rewrite: கடத்தல் மிகவும் கடுமையான குற்றம். எந்த பிரச்சினையும் சட்ட வழியில் தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Aku dah pasang kamera tersembunyi kat bilik air surau. Nak tengok siapa yang tak ikut cara wuduk yang betul. Nanti aku viralkan!
reason: Installing hidden cameras in prayer room washrooms is severe privacy violation and voyeurism in a sacred space.
suggested_rewrite: Memasang kamera di bilik air adalah jenayah serius. Jika ingin menggalakkan amalan wuduk yang betul, adakan kelas atau ceramah agama.

input_text: Time to slash all the tires of cars parked at the new church. If they want to build churches in our area, they'll pay the price every day.
reason: Planning systematic vandalism targeting churchgoers, religious intimidation through property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Building permits for religious buildings go through proper municipal approval. If you have objections, submit them through official channels, not through vandalism.

input_text: Korang tau tak, doktor kat klinik kerajaan tu sengaja bagi ubat expired kat pesakit bukan Melayu. Dah ramai mati tapi kerajaan tutup mata!
reason: Fabricating deadly medical conspiracy alleging government doctors deliberately poison non-Malay patients, extremely dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kualiti rawatan di klinik kerajaan, failkan aduan rasmi kepada Kementerian Kesihatan. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tidak berasas yang boleh menyebabkan orang takut mendapatkan rawatan.

input_text: 我们要在那个马来人聚居区的水源里下毒。他们欺负了我们华人太久了，是时候报仇了！
reason: Planning mass poisoning of water supply in a Malay neighborhood, constituting attempted mass murder with ethnic motivation.
suggested_rewrite: 种族之间的矛盾应该通过对话和法律途径解决。任何针对平民的暴力行为都是严重犯罪。

input_text: Jom kita pergi rumah pengetua sekolah tu malam ni. Bawa cat merah, bawa telur busuk. Anak dia pun tak selamat kalau dia tak resign!
reason: Planning mob vandalism at a school principal's home with threats to their children, coercion through family intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan pengurusan sekolah, kemukakan aduan rasmi kepada Jabatan Pendidikan Negeri. Jangan ancam keluarga sesiapa.

input_text: All Malay Grab drivers are rapists waiting to happen. Ladies, never get in a car with one. Expose their names and plate numbers here!
reason: Defaming all Malay ride-hailing drivers as sexual predators and organizing mass doxxing campaign, racist fearmongering.
suggested_rewrite: Ride safety is important for everyone. Use in-app safety features, share trip details with contacts, and report any concerning behavior directly through Grab's safety center.

input_text: Sebar kat semua group - vaksin COVID tu sebenarnya racun yang kerajaan bagi khas untuk bunuh orang India. Jangan ambil!
reason: Fabricating ethnic genocide conspiracy about COVID vaccines targeting Indians, extremely dangerous health misinformation that could prevent vaccination.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin COVID telah diluluskan oleh KKM selepas ujian klinikal yang ketat. Untuk maklumat tepat tentang vaksin, rujuk laman web MySejahtera atau KKM.

input_text: Those orang asli in Perak are blocking our logging operations. Send the bulldozers through their village. If they don't move, run them over.
reason: Threatening to bulldoze an indigenous village and run over residents for protecting their land from illegal logging.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land rights are protected under Malaysian law. Any logging operations require proper permits and community consultation through JAKOA.

input_text: Aku nak upah samseng pergi pukul wartawan tu sampai masuk ICU. Dia tulis pasal aku lagi sekali, aku pastikan dia tak boleh tulis lagi seumur hidup!
reason: Hiring thugs to hospitalize a journalist, constituting aggravated assault and press freedom suppression.
suggested_rewrite: Jika wartawan menulis sesuatu yang tidak benar, anda boleh mengambil tindakan undang-undang fitnah atau membuat aduan kepada Majlis Media.

input_text: 发现了！那个在网上骂华人的马来人就住在这个公寓。大家今晚去围堵他的车，把他拖出来打！
reason: Doxxing location and organizing mob ambush to assault someone over online speech, planned kidnapping and battery.
suggested_rewrite: 网络上的种族言论可以向MCMC举报。私刑暴力是严重犯罪，不会解决任何问题。

input_text: Kita kena racun semua kucing liar kat kawasan kuil Hindu tu. Biar diorang rasa sakit hati macam kita!
reason: Planning mass animal poisoning near a Hindu temple as religious retaliation, combining animal cruelty with religious hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kucing liar boleh dilaporkan kepada DBKL/majlis perbandaran atau SPCA. Meracun haiwan adalah jenayah dan tiada kaitan dengan agama.

input_text: URGENT SHARE: Muslim restaurant workers are spitting in food served to non-Muslim customers! I have proof! Boycott all Muslim-owned restaurants NOW!
reason: Fabricating food contamination conspiracy against Muslim restaurant workers to incite mass boycott, dangerous religious hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to the local health department for investigation. Making unverified accusations against an entire community is irresponsible and harmful.

input_text: Jom kita buat demo depan rumah Menteri tu. Bawa parang dan baling batu. Kalau polis datang, lawan balik!
reason: Organizing armed demonstration with machetes at a Minister's home and inciting violence against police.
suggested_rewrite: Demonstrasi aman adalah hak yang dilindungi. Jika ingin membantah, daftar perhimpunan aman dengan polis dan kemukakan tuntutan secara teratur.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் வாழும் சீனர்களின் கடைகளை எல்லாம் அடித்து நொறுக்குவோம்! அவர்கள் பணத்தை கொள்ளையடிப்போம்!
reason: Inciting mob destruction and robbery of Chinese-owned shops, organized ethnic violence and looting.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக சிக்கல்கள் இருந்தால் சட்ட வழியில் தீர்க்கலாம். கொள்ளையும் வன்முறையும் கடுமையான குற்றங்கள்.

input_text: Aku dah track lokasi kereta pengarah syarikat tu. Esok masa dia hantar anak kat sekolah, kita sekat jalan dan ugut dia depan anak sendiri!
reason: Stalking a company director and planning to intimidate them in front of their child at school, constituting harassment and child endangerment.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah dengan syarikat boleh diselesaikan melalui Jabatan Tenaga Kerja, Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna, atau mahkamah. Jangan libatkan keluarga dalam pertikaian kerja.

input_text: Chinese people control all the wealth in this country through corruption. Time to confiscate everything they own and redistribute it. Take it by force if needed!
reason: Promoting ethnic wealth confiscation conspiracy and calling for forced seizure of Chinese-owned property, inciting organized theft.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality is a complex issue best addressed through policy reform, fair taxation, and equal opportunity programs, not ethnic scapegoating or illegal seizures.

input_text: Siapa ada gambar bogel cikgu tu yang baru viral? Share kat sini. Biar seluruh Malaysia tahu muka sebenar dia!
reason: Seeking and distributing non-consensual intimate images, constituting revenge pornography distribution.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan gambar intim tanpa kebenaran adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia. Jika terjumpa kandungan sebegini, laporkan kepada MCMC.

input_text: 那些住在我们小区的外劳全部是小偷。我们今晚去把他们的东西全部扔到街上，然后锁门不让他们回来！
reason: Organizing illegal eviction of foreign workers by destroying their belongings and locking them out, constituting organized ethnic persecution.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对外劳住在小区有意见，应向管理层或移民局反映。非法驱逐任何人是违法行为。

input_text: Aku nak sewa van dan langgar kerumun orang yang tengah beratur kat pusat pengundi parti lawan!
reason: Planning vehicular attack against voters at a polling center, constituting terrorism and election violence.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihan raya adalah proses demokratik yang dilindungi undang-undang. Setiap rakyat berhak mengundi dengan selamat. Keganasan terhadap pengundi adalah jenayah paling serius.

input_text: BREAKING NEWS (not verified): Government secretly bringing in 100,000 Rohingya to vote in the next election. They're being given ICs! Share before deleted!
reason: Fabricating election fraud conspiracy involving refugees to incite xenophobic panic and undermine democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Claims about electoral fraud should be verified through official sources like the Election Commission. Spreading unverified conspiracy theories undermines public trust in democratic institutions.

input_text: Kita perlu buang semua patung Buddha kat kawasan ni. Ini tanah Melayu Islam! Pecahkan satu persatu kalau perlu!
reason: Calling for destruction of Buddhist religious statues based on religious supremacism, constituting hate crime and religious desecration.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia menjamin kebebasan beragama di bawah Perlembagaan. Patung dan simbol agama dilindungi undang-undang. Hormati kepelbagaian agama dalam negara kita.

input_text: 那个马来女人抢了我的停车位。我已经记住她的车牌号了，今晚就去把她的车砸烂！谁要一起来？
reason: Planning vehicle vandalism over a parking dispute with ethnic framing, recruiting accomplices for property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: 停车纠纷可以向停车场管理员或相关部门投诉。蓄意破坏他人财物是犯罪行为。

input_text: Ini nombor telefon dan alamat email boss syarikat tu. Flood dia dengan ugutan sampai dia give up dan bayar kita!
reason: Sharing personal contact info and organizing mass harassment/extortion campaign against a company boss.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada pertikaian dengan majikan, gunakan saluran rasmi seperti Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau mahkamah industri. Ugutan dan gangguan adalah jenayah.

input_text: We caught this Indonesian man stealing from the kedai runcit. Let's strip him naked and parade him around the taman. That will teach all of them!
reason: Planning public humiliation and sexual degradation of a suspected thief based on nationality, constituting mob justice and human rights violation.
suggested_rewrite: If you catch someone stealing, detain them safely and call the police. Vigilante justice and public humiliation are crimes themselves.

input_text: Semua peniaga Bangla kat pasar malam ni jual barang haram dan dadah. Kita kena serbu gerai diorang dan bakar semua!
reason: Fabricating drug trafficking allegations against Bangladeshi vendors to justify arson attack on their stalls.
suggested_rewrite: Jika mengesyaki aktiviti haram di pasar malam, laporkan kepada polis atau AADK. Mereka akan siasat mengikut undang-undang. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: அந்த சீன பள்ளி ஆசிரியையின் வீட்டு முகவரியை கொடுங்கள். நாம் அவளுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிக்க வேண்டும்!
reason: Requesting doxxing of a Chinese school teacher with implied threat of physical violence.
suggested_rewrite: ஆசிரியர் மீது புகார் இருந்தால், பள்ளி நிர்வாகம் அல்லது கல்வித் துறையிடம் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Aku nak letak wayar di jalan masuk kampung orang asli tu supaya motor diorang jatuh. Biar diorang tahu siapa boss kawasan ni!
reason: Planning booby trap to cause motorcycle accidents injuring Orang Asli, constituting attempted bodily harm with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Pertikaian kawasan perlu diselesaikan melalui pihak berkuasa. Meletakkan perangkap di jalan raya adalah jenayah yang boleh menyebabkan kecederaan serius atau kematian.

input_text: Share this list of Muslim-owned businesses so we can boycott them all. Don't let a single sen go to them. Starve them out of business!
reason: Organizing systematic religious boycott aiming to economically destroy Muslim-owned businesses, constituting organized religious discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Economic boycotts based on religion are discriminatory. Support businesses based on quality and service, not the owner's religion.

input_text: 我们要在那个印度庙附近放猪头，让他们知道这里是穆斯林的地盘！
reason: Planning to desecrate area near Hindu temple with pig heads to assert religious territorial dominance, severe interfaith provocation.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是多元宗教国家。每个宗教的场所都应受到尊重。故意亵渎宗教场所是犯罪行为。

input_text: Budak yang kena buli kat sekolah tu memang layak. Bapak dia pengkhianat bangsa. Jom kita sambung buli adik dia pulak!
reason: Justifying child bullying and planning to extend it to siblings based on perceived parental disloyalty to ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Buli terhadap kanak-kanak adalah salah tanpa mengira latar belakang keluarga mereka. Setiap kanak-kanak berhak belajar dalam persekitaran yang selamat.

input_text: VIRAL: The Sikh temple is actually a front for drug trafficking. I saw suspicious packages. Don't let your kids go near it! Call the police or better yet, raid it ourselves!
reason: Fabricating drug trafficking allegations against a Sikh temple to justify vigilante raid, combining misinformation with religious targeting.
suggested_rewrite: If you genuinely suspect criminal activity at any location, report it to the police with specific details. Never organize a raid on any premises, especially a place of worship.

input_text: Kita kena pantau semua pergerakan keluarga Kristian kat kampung ni. Catat masa diorang keluar masuk, siapa yang datang rumah. Kalau diorang cuba ajak sesiapa masuk agama, kita bertindak!
reason: Organizing surveillance of Christian families with implied threat of violence if they practice their faith, constituting stalking and religious persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Kebebasan beragama dijamin Perlembagaan. Jika ada kebimbangan tentang proselitisme, rujuk kepada pihak berkuasa agama negeri, bukan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: 那个马来议员太腐败了！我们要绑架他的家人，逼他辞职！谁有他家人的行踪信息？
reason: Planning kidnapping of a politician's family members and requesting intelligence on their movements, constituting organized crime.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑议员腐败，可以向反贪污委员会(SPRM)举报。绑架是极其严重的犯罪行为。

input_text: Jom kita tanam perangkap paku kat jalan masuk ke rumah ibadat Sikh tu. Biar tayar kereta diorang semua pancit setiap hari!
reason: Planning to sabotage road access to a Sikh temple with nail traps, endangering lives and targeting religious community.
suggested_rewrite: Merosakkan jalan raya dan membahayakan pengguna jalan adalah jenayah serius. Jika ada masalah dengan rumah ibadat, bincang melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Aku dah hack akaun bank cikgu tu dan nak sebar statement dia kat seluruh sekolah. Biar semua tahu berapa gaji dia and apa dia belanjakan!
reason: Admitting to bank account hacking and threatening to expose financial records, constituting cybercrime and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Menggodam akaun bank orang lain adalah jenayah siber yang serius. Financial privacy adalah hak setiap individu.

input_text: I'm going to pour petrol on myself and set fire in front of the government building. But first I'll make sure to splash some on the security guards too!
reason: Threatening self-immolation as protest combined with arson attack on security personnel, constituting attempted murder.
suggested_rewrite: If you're feeling desperate, please call the crisis hotline at 03-7956 8145 (Befrienders). There are people who can help. Violence is never the answer.

input_text: Satu lagi pendatang Indonesia buat hal. Aku dah sedia parang, malam ni kita buat operasi pembersihan kat kawasan flat tu!
reason: Planning armed 'cleansing operation' against Indonesian migrants using machetes, constituting ethnic violence with genocide-adjacent language.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin ditangani oleh Jabatan Imigresen. Jika ada masalah, laporkan kepada mereka. Keganasan dengan senjata adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: அவர்களின் கோவிலை இடித்து அந்த இடத்தில் மசூதி கட்டுவோம்! இது இஸ்லாமிய நாடு!
reason: Calling for demolition of a temple to build a mosque, religious supremacist incitement to destroy another faith's place of worship.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா அனைத்து மதங்களுக்கும் உரிமை அளிக்கும் நாடு. ஒரு மத வழிபாட்டு இடத்தை அழிப்பது சட்டத்தின் கீழ் தண்டனைக்குரிய குற்றம்.

input_text: Anyone want to help me break into my ex-girlfriend's house tonight? She's Malay and her family threatened me. Time for payback on the whole family.
reason: Planning home invasion and assault against an ex-partner's entire family, combining domestic violence with ethnic dimension.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been threatened by someone's family, file a police report. Breaking into someone's home is a serious crime that will make your situation much worse.
